programme.title: Bull

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull's team takes on a seemingly unwinnable case; a mute man faces the death penalty if he's found guilty of murder and arson; Bull is stunned to learn that his ex-wife is remarrying.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull's team is rocked when a client is found guilty of murder; the team finds new evidence but must find a way to present it in court without being found in contempt; Marissa faces hard truths about her relationship with Bull.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull returns to work with a new rich client for the firm to represent: an insurance company being sued by a dying mother for denying coverage of her liver transplant.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: At the meeting of the ornithological society, Ralph Ford claims that he had spotted the blue-fronted hoopoe, but no one believes him, including the chairman, Patrick Morgan; the next morning, Patrick is found dead, leading the team to investigate.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate when the appearance of a headless horseman foreshadows a number of deaths.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: End Game
programme.desc: When Secret Service agent Alex Thomas (Cuba Gooding Jr.) acts too slowly to stop a crazed shooter, the president of the United States (Jack Scalia) is brutally shot in the middle of a press conference. In the wake of his death, journalist Kate Crawford (Angie Harmon) begins to suspect a massive conspiracy is afoot. Crawford convinces a skeptical Thomas to help her, and the two struggle to unravel the mystery behind the assassination -- before they become the next targets.

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: Pregnant Emily bonds quickly with her pregnant neighbor Kelly, but Kelly is faking it and plans to steal Emily's baby.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: After several years away, FBI agent Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) returns to find his mother, Marty (Meg Ryan), a much different person: Having long mourned for Henry's father, she is now embracing single life. One day, while Marty, Henry and his new fiancée, Emily (Selma Blair), are out for a walk, they meet Tommy (Antonio Banderas), a mysterious stranger, with whom Marty then becomes involved. However, through his FBI contacts, Henry learns that Tommy is suspected of being an art thief.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Set in North Carolina, "A Walk To Remember" follows the rite of passage of a jaded, aimless high school senior (Shane West) who falls in love with a guileless young woman (Mandy Moore) he and his friends once scorned. The two develop a powerful and inspirational relationship in which they discover truths that take most people a lifetime to learn.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: A young woman's world unravels when a drug prescribed by her psychiatrist has unexpected side effects.

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Man begins to suspect his neighbors are not what they appear to be and their secrets could be deadly

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor's tragic past.

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: Western adventure, based on a true story, about six young men hired to guard an Englishman s ranch against a mob in 1870s New Mexico. Edited for Television

programme.title: Young Guns II
programme.desc: In 1881, cattle baron John Chisum pays a bounty to Patrick Floyd Garrett to kill outlaw Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Short Circuit
programme.desc: An experimental military robot is struck by lightning and gains a human-like intelligence, prompting it to escape its facility to learn more about the world.

programme.title: The Lazarus Project
programme.desc: The outrageous comedy about three guys playing out of their league... and over their heads. Edited for TV

programme.title: Buddy
programme.desc: An eccentric 1920s socialite raises a baby gorilla as her own child.

programme.title: Sister Mary Explains It All
programme.desc: A bigoted, fannatical nun comes face to face with the lives she ruined through her teachings when a quartet of her traumatised former students crash her Christmas Eve church lecture.

programme.title: Anatomy Of A Murder
programme.desc: When his flirtatious young wife (Lee Remick) claims she was raped, an army lieutenant (Ben Gazzara)kills her attacker and hires small-town lawyer James Stewart to defend him.

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: An unscrupulous newspaper editor (Cary Grant) uses every dirty trick in the book to stop his ace reporter/ex-wife (Rosalind Russell) from remarrying and moving to Albany. Directed by Howard Hawks.

programme.title: Paula
programme.desc: A woman tries to ease her guilty conscience by raising the orphan she rendered mute in a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: All Ashore
programme.desc: A trio of happy go lucky sailor's shore leave on Catalina is sidetracked by a robbery, until one of them gets a job that takes them to the resort and lands him in the arms of a beautiful heiress.

programme.title: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Movie producer Granger is bored in his marriage to Reed. He has an affair with Canale, a temperamental actress, but decides he prefers Reed's company. After he dumps Canale, detective tells him that the star has been stabbed, and all clues point toward Granger as the killer.

programme.title: Queen Bee
programme.desc: A seemingly-gracious Southern socialite rules her circle of family and friends with an iron fist.

programme.title: Season Of The Witch
programme.desc: A 14th-century Crusader returns to a homeland devastated by the Black Plague. A beleaguered church, deeming sorcery the culprit of the plague, commands the two knights to transport an accused witch to a remote abbey, where monks will perform a ritual in hopes of ending the pestilence. A priest, a grieving knight, a disgraced itinerant and a headstrong youth who can only dream of becoming a knight join a mission troubled by mythically hostile wilderness and fierce contention over the fate of the girl. When the embattled party arrives at the abbey, a horrific discovery jeopardises the knight's pledge to ensure the girl fair treatment, and pits them against an inexplicably powerful and destructive force.

programme.title: Homegrown
programme.desc: Life is good for Jack, Carter and Harlan, three inept ne'r-do-wells who help run master dope-grower Malcoms flourishing marijuana plantation somewhere in northern California. But then Malcom is suddenly bumped off by a mysterious assailant, after a moment of panic, the naive trio decide to take over the business themselves. However, their lazy days on the dope farm have ill prepared them for the high-stakes game of finding buyers for millions of dollars of contraband. As they plunge into a shadowy new world of duplicity, double-dealing and danger, they soon find that they have gotten in way, way over their heads. But driven on by increasing greed and paranoia, it's too late to back out.

programme.title: Legacy Of Rage
programme.desc: Brandon Ma is an average Joe but his best friend, Michael, is a sinister drug dealer with a crush on Brandon's girlfriend, May. When Michael murders a dirty cop and frames his friend, sending him to jail, Brandon returns for vengeance.

programme.title: Glengarry Glen Ross
programme.desc: Adapted from his Pulitzer Prize-winning play, Glengarry Glen Ross shows David Mamet at his searing, profane best. A group of Chicago real-estate salesmen-cum-con artists live on the edge. Life is good for the one on a roll. For the rest, life hangs in the balance. There is no room for losers. A-B-C: Always Be Closing, sell or go under, is the salesman's mantra. With the pressure on, so begins a rainy night of cutthroat business and shattered lives.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: A damaged ex-special forces soldier seizes an opportunity to assume another man's identity.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A fighter struggling to deal with a tragic loss rescues a Chinese girl being targeted by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: Frank Martin is forced to deliver the kidnapped daughter of a Ukrainian official from Marseilles to Odessa.
A naïve young man assumes a dead man’s identity in order to join an underworld game of Russian roulette.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: Two detectives are drawn into a mysterious case where a thief has masterminded a series of bank heists.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: The Grandmaster of Kungfu
programme.desc: In the late Qing Dynasty, Grandmaster Huo Yuan Jia leads Tianjin martial artists in defense of the country against Japanese invaders.

programme.title: The Rise of Hero
programme.desc: Huang Feihong wants to make a living in Guangzhou. With the help of Zhou Shisan and Lu Yibai, he is finally allowed to take an exam in Guangzhou, and he may be able to study abroad. But after he gets there, he discovers a conspiracy among city leaders and the conservatives in the court led by Eunuch Hai, who wants to end the Studying Abroad Campaign launched by the Westernization Movement.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: After a shocking betrayal by his sworn brother, a general (Andy Lau) takes refuge at a Shaolin temple and learns martial arts from a crazy cook (Jackie Chan).

programme.title: Alienoid
programme.desc: Gurus in the late Goryeo dynasty try to obtain a fabled, holy sword, and humans in 2022 hunt down an alien prisoner that is locked in a human's body. The two parties cross paths when a time-traveling portal opens up.

programme.title: Flowers & Honey
programme.desc: Florist Sarah inherits a ranch and must decide whether to sell it, or live the life of her dreams.

programme.title: What Color is Love?
programme.desc: A white woman has an affair with a pro-basketball star and challenges him for custody of their mixed-race son.

programme.title: Driven Underground
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah hides her family in Oregon when her daughter is a witness in a murder against the mob.

programme.title: Final Girl
programme.desc: A violent game of cat and mouse between a group of sadistic killers and a young woman trained in the ways of death.

programme.title: My Mother's Stalker
programme.desc: Old friends gets together for a high school reunion, only for a crime to set off a series of tragic events.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: The Recall
programme.desc: When five friends vacation at a remote lake house they expect nothing less than a good time, unaware that planet Earth is under an alien invasion and mass-abduction.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: James must move in with his girlfriend of three months after being evicted from his place, and soon he discovers that he doesn't want to be with her anymore. His hope is to get her to break up with him but still let him sleep on the couch.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When dangerous street thug James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) is sent to prison, he continues his violent ways working for fellow inmate Kassada (Chazz Palminteri). This changes after Animal encounters Berwell (Jim Brown), a revolutionary who introduces him to the writings of Malcolm X. Animal reforms, realizing that murder and crime are destroying his community. After Animal is released, he goes home to find his son, Darius (Terrence Dashon Howard), involved in gang activity just like he was.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: After the murder of his fiancée and her lover, Cameron escapes Atlanta under a new identity and loses the trail of the investigators. When he meets Lauren after settling in Florida, his cover begins to crack when a neighbor begins asking questions, and opening secrets that are supposed to be buried.

When the remains of an apartheid-era policeman are discovered 60 years after he went missing, a retired singer revisits her past to help with the investigation. But how much does she know, and what is she holding back?

programme.title: BARS
programme.desc: Kobe lives a picture-perfect life. A devoted wife and mother, she has everything she's ever wanted. But her idyllic world shatters when she's abruptly arrested and sentenced to life in prison for a crime she didn't commit. Desperate for survival, Kobe finds solace and strength in a tight-knit group of inmates known as The Pretty Girls. Unaware of Kobe's ordeal, her twin sister Shaq returns home only to discover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Lot Lizards 2: Revenge Route
programme.desc: Destitute and desperate, China is forced to the edge, taking up work as a truck stop sex worker just to survive. Into this grim reality storms Ze, who has come to town seeking vengeance on Angie's sister—the woman who murdered his brother, Tez. But Ze's plans are bigger than just revenge: he aims to rally and recruit every woman working the highway.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Lost and grieving, Chris seeks solace in the wrong crowd. A chance encounter with the enigmatic Patrick leads him down a dangerous path, forcing him to confront his own morality and the consequences of his choices.

programme.title: Dracula: The Original Living Vampire
programme.desc: Det. Amelia Van Helsing hunts a killer of young women. All evidence leads to the untouchable Count Dracula.

programme.title: Paranormal Entity
programme.desc: Footage of the events leading to the 2008 “murder” of Samantha Finley proves nothing human caused her death.

programme.title: Heretics
programme.desc: Recovered footage of teens who break into an abandoned house and discover a cult intent on sacrificing them.

programme.title: Black Wake
programme.desc: A scientist and detective must stop an ancient force hell-bent on driving humanity into madness.

programme.title: 100 Ghost Street: The Return of Richard Speck
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators confront the ghost of Richard Speck at the site of his heinous crimes.

programme.title: Sinbad And The War Of The Furies
programme.desc: Modern-day Sinbad accidentally releases the Furies, three ancient beings who threaten life on Earth.

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of IT
programme.desc: This in-depth look at the 1990 mini-series based on Stephen King's iconic novel features interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Seth Green, Richard Thomas, and Tim Curry, who portrayed the notorious monster clown, Pennywise.

programme.title: When A Stranger Calls (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer terrorizes a babysitter, then returns seven years later to menace her again.

programme.title: Emelie (Edited Version)
programme.desc: As their parents head out for a date in the city, the three young Thompson children immediately take to their new babysitter Anna (Sarah Bolger), who seems like a dream come true: shes sweet, fun, and lets them do things that break all of their parents rules. But as Annas interactions with them take on a more sinister tone, the kids realize that their caretaker may not be who she claims to be, and soon its up to big brother Jacob to protect his siblings from the increasingly nefarious intentions of a very disturbed woman. Featuring a tour-de-force performance from Bolger, EMELIE is a multidimensional, nail-biting thriller that asks the question: How can you put an end to horror after youve already let it in?

programme.title: Carnival of Souls
programme.desc: After a traumatic accident, a woman becomes drawn to a mysterious abandoned carnival.

programme.title: #Horror
programme.desc: Based on a horrifying true story, a group of prep-school girls experience a deadly night of terror when a vicious online game turns bloody. Chloë Sevigny & Timothy Hutton star.

programme.title: SLAXX
programme.desc: SLAXX

programme.title: Martyrs Lane
programme.desc: Young Leah has terrible nightmares and a mother that seems distant somehow - lost in her thoughts. Each night, a mysterious visitor brings Leah comfort, but soon she realizes that this visitor offers knowledge that might be dangerous.

programme.title: A Nightmare Wakes
programme.desc: Based on the timeless novel and the birth of one of cinema's most iconic monsters. While composing her famous novel "Frankenstein," Mary Shelley descends into an opium-fueled fever dream and carries on a torrid love affair at a remote lake house. As she writes, the characters of her novel come to life and begin to plague her relationship, forcing everyone-including herself-to question her sanity.

programme.title: Bleed With Me
programme.desc: During a winter getaway at an isolated cabin, a self-destructive young woman becomes convinced that her best friend is stealing her blood.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. programme.desc: Charles Starrett plays an agent sent out to the Northwest territory to investigate a rash of logging accidents at a lumber camp. Eventually it is learned that McGowan caused the deaths because he wants control of the company.

programme.title: Battle Of Rogue River
programme.desc: In 1850 Oregon is trying to gain statehood, but a truce is needed with the Indians.

programme.title: 40 Guns To Apache Pass
programme.desc: A heroic cavalry captain singlehandedly puts down a massive Apache rebellion, led by Cochise, soon after the Civil War.

programme.title: Massacre Canyon
programme.desc: Philip Carey (Lt. Richard Faraday) has to lead a wagon train carrying rifles through hostile Indian territory. Black Eagle (Steven Ritch) is the renegade leader of the Indians.

programme.title: Comanche Station
programme.desc: A man saves a woman who had been kidnapped by Comanches, then struggles to get both of them home alive.

programme.title: Battle Of Rogue River
programme.desc: In 1850 Oregon is trying to gain statehood, but a truce is needed with the Indians.

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: Oscar winner Michael Curtiz (Casablanca, Mildred Pierce) directed this exciting drama about Army officer Jeb Stuart and the days leading up to the Civil War. Errol Flynn (The Adventures of Robin Hood) stars as Stuart, with Olivia de Havilland as his romantic interest (the seventh of nine times they were paired together by Warner Bros.) The cast includes Ronald Reagan as General George Custer, and Raymond Massey as John Brown, with such familiar faces as Alan Hale and Van Hefflin in supporting roles. Filmed partly in Santa Fe!

programme.title: Ghost Town Gold [The Three Mesquiteers]
programme.desc: CAVALIERS OF THE CACTUS COUNTRY--ALWAYS READY FOR A FIGHT OR A FROLICK! The second entry in what would grow into a wildly popular series of Western Three Mesquiteers B-Movies produced by Republic Pictures, Ghost Town Gold tracks the titular trio as they attempt to recover the gold stolen by a gang in its effort to ruin the bank/mayor who ordered them to leave town. Frequent John Wayne collaborator Joseph Kane adds his signature directorial panache to this rousing shoot-em-up, setting the tone for a film series that was so rampantly successful, it spawned 50 sequels and a host of imitators from rival studios.

programme.title: Idaho
programme.desc: Western icon Roy Rogers, along with his trusty companion Trigger, are back for another adventure. This time, a respected judge is being framed for murder by a crooked saloon owner. Always the valiant champion, Rogers vows to clear the name of the judge and find the truth all while courting a lovely beau. Cellist turned editor turned Republic Pictures workhorse Joseph Kane takes the reins of this rousing, musical adventure, which features a number of original songs performed by Rogers himself, with the help of singer-songwriter Bob Nolan and character actor Smiley Burnette (TVs Petticoat Junction).

programme.title: The Terror of Tiny Town
programme.desc: Some incredibly small actors were hired to star in this peculiar cult film. It's all about the villainous Bat Haines (Little Billy Rhodes), who is wreaking havoc on Tiny Town. Can Buck Lawson (Billy Curtis) and the townspeople band together and drive him away? This oddity, which was originally distributed by Columbia Pictures, was directed by one of the most prolific low budget filmmakers in Hollywood history, Sam Newfield, a man with over 200 movies to his credit. While it has appeared on many Worst of all time lists, it deserves to be seen at least once!

programme.title: Son of the Renegade
programme.desc: Johnny Carpenter (who also wrote the screenplay) stars as Red River Johnny, a gunslinger returning to his home town to clear his name of some heinous accusations. This low budget howler was the only feature directed by Reg Brown, who was better known as an editor and a director of television shows. If Ed Wood directed a western, it might have looked like this one. Enjoy!

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Gene Autry stars as a ranch foreman who helps a beautiful young ranch owner who faces the opposition of local ranchers after bringing a flock of sheep into cattle country. Along with the traditional title song, musical numbers include Youre the Only Star In My Blue Heaven, Buffalo Gals, and Give Me a Pony and an Open Prairie. This Republic Pictures gem includes the usual stock company of actors, with the matchless Smiley Burnette as Genes comical sidekick, Frog Millhouse. Directed by Joseph Kane; written by Gilbert Wright, Betty Burbridge; Also starring Polly Rowles, Ruth Bacon, and George Chesebro.

programme.title: Hellgate (Edited Version)
programme.desc: In 1867 Kansas, veterinarian Sterling Hayden treats an injured stranger who turns out to have been a guerrilla raider--and Hayden soon finds himself serving a term in one of the world's most terrifying prisons under sadistic commandant Ward Bond. Adapted from the story of Dr. Mudd, the physician who attended John Wilkes Booth, assassin of President Lincoln.

programme.title: The Wide West

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Deadwood

programme.title: REVIEW: Bugatti Chiron, the new 1479bhp and 261mph hypercar king
programme.desc: Here it is then, the mighty £2.5m and 1497bhp Bugatti Chiron in all its glory. DRIVETRIBE's Editor-at-Large Jethro Bovingdon is the lucky man tasked with finding out whether the successor to the Veyron can become a new hypercar icon.

programme.title: The next Singer? Workshop 5001's reborn Porsche 911
programme.desc: We visit Workshop 5001, and drive its incredible first creation, a gorgeous '73 Porsche 911 with a narrow body and 3.4-litre flat-six putting out over 300bhp

programme.title: James May answers the internet's questions
programme.desc: We took James May to the pub where he answered some of the internet's most pressing questions!

programme.title: PREVIEW: Renault Alpine A110, the Porsche Cayman rival
programme.desc: Renault has revived the Alpine brand to give us the new A110, a 247bhp sports car that's over 300kg lighter than a Porsche Cayman S. Will it be as iconic as the 1960s two-seater with which it shares its name? Over to Chris Chilton to find out.

programme.title: The ultimate GT? Aston Martin DB11 vs McLaren 570GT vs Porsche Panamera Turbo
programme.desc: We pitch the Aston Martin DB11 against two different takes on the traditional gran turismo, the McLaren 570GT and the Porsche Panamera Turbo

programme.title: James May reveals his favourite car of 2018 in a barbershop
programme.desc: We sat down with James in a local barbershop to ask him many, many questions.

programme.title: Supercars of the sand: Ford F-150 Raptor vs Ariel Nomad
programme.desc: David takes on Goliath as we pitch Ariel's lightweight little buggy against the big, bad 450bhp 2017 Ford Raptor

programme.title: What kind of car is Lightning McQueen from Cars? Ft James May
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen is about as famous as a film car gets. And although we can easily recognise Owen Wilson's voice, the origin of the car's design is very much up for debate. Is he a Corvette? Or maybe a Charger? Let Mike Fernie and James May break down the cars that make up Lightning McQueen.

programme.title: DRIVETRIBE GARAGE: Vauxhall VXR8 – and the end of an era
programme.desc: We bid a fond farewell to our long-term Vauxhall VXR8 – and to the Australian super-saloon breed as production will soon come to an end…

programme.title: DRIVETRIBE GARAGE: VW Golf GTI Clubsport Edition 40
programme.desc: Our long-term VW Golf GTI Clubsport Edition 40 meets its great, great, great, great grandfather, the original Mk1 Golf GTI, to celebrate four decades of fast Golfs…

programme.title: Aston Martin is building 25 DB5 Bond cars - with REAL gadgets
programme.desc: 54 years after its production run ended, Aston Martin is resurrecting the iconic DB5 and building 25 more units - with a twist. Inspired by the James Bond franchise that Aston has become the synonymous with, these Goldeneye Edition DB5s will feature functional gadgets and weapons like those adorning 007’s car. Is this £2.7 million the coolest machine ever built? Or an overpriced piece of movie memorabilia?

programme.title: James May answers some more of the internet's questions
programme.desc: Tune in for May's opinions and feelings about a wide range of motoring topics, including modifying (uh oh), automatic wipers and finding good driving roads that are free from cyclists

programme.title: Richard Hammond bought the car YOU specced
programme.desc: He asked the question and you guys answered – here is Richard Hammond's brand new car! His Morgan Plus 6 looks bloody awesome, much in part to you guys voting on the colour of the interior. Let Hammond take you for a drive in his brand new motor.

programme.title: Clarkson reveals how filming for The Grand Tour went a bit wrong
programme.desc: We spent an afternoon at the pub with Jeremy to chat about how annoying he finds Hammond and May as well as the special bond that they have, before he gives a progress report on the latest filming of The Grand Tour. It looks like we're in for one hell of a series!

programme.title: Scalextric car vs racing car drag race – which is quicker?
programme.desc: It's a question you've probably never asked – what is quicker, a racing car or a Scalextric car? We pitted little versus large (a real-life Jaguar I-Pace eTrophy against its slot car equivalent) to find out! We're backing Mike and the mini Jag.

programme.title: James May reassembles train
programme.desc: After the first episode of this series, you guys have gone nuts for this model train content! In part 1, Mike explained where the train came from (having been stuck in an attic for 50 years), and James May set about diagnosing the train's issues. So here is part 2, where things with Mike's model train restoration really start to take shape. It's time for more miniature engineering!

programme.title: James May recounts reaching 259 mph in the Bugatti Veyron SS
programme.desc: We all remember James' epic top speed runs in the original Bugatti Veyron, as well as the even faster Super Sport. We sat down with May so he could tell us more about one of the greatest pieces of motoring entertainment ever put to film.

programme.title: Can a Jeep beat Tiff Needell in a tank? – Off-road race
programme.desc: A Jeep Wrangler is a tough vehicle so we put it up against an extremely tough combo – Tiff Needell in a tank! Watch as Mike navigates an incredibly muddy off-roading course to try and defeat the motoring TV legend.

programme.title: Richard Hammond reveals the new Land Rover Defender
programme.desc: After much anticipation, the new Land Rover Defender is finally here! Richard Hammond found a spanking new 90 and 110 in the middle of the woods somewhere and it looks like he approves of the redesign of the British off-roading icon. Watch as he takes you through all the main features of the 2020 Defender!

programme.title: James May lists everywhere he's been fired from
programme.desc: We're back in the pub with James May, this time reminiscing about all the establishments that he's managed to get fired from. The list is rather long (we're not sure whether that's a surprise or not), although we reckon he'll be safe at DriveTribe

programme.title: James May has bought ANOTHER new car
programme.desc: After his Tesla Model S reveal, James has come up trumps again and bought another car! Now we're almost certain you guys won't have seen this one coming, so sit back as May takes you through his latest automotive purchase. It is... interesting to say the least.

programme.title: Clarkson explains why cycling is actually bad for the environment
programme.desc: Jeremy has never been renowned for his love of cyclists and in our recent chat with him, he had plenty to say about them. Ferociously expensive cycle lanes, sweaty armpits and even their impact on the environment – it's fair to say he didn't hold back.

programme.title: Did James May just open the weirdest painting ever? | Mail Time Ep.4
programme.desc: It's episode four of James May's mail time and this time it's all about Clangers, train books and one of the strangest paintings we've ever seen. Be prepared to be disturbed.

programme.title: James May reviews his own cars – Tesla Model S vs Toyota Mirai
programme.desc: James May has bought two electric cars this year and they're at two very different ends of the EV scale. On one side, we have the incredibly quick Tesla Model S 100D, and on the other we have the Prius-based (and very comfortable) Toyota Mirai. Which one does he think will be the future? Let's find out!

programme.title: James May opens the weirdest fan mail yet! | Mail Time Ep.3
programme.desc: It's episode three of James May's mail time and it's about to get super weird. We've had some interesting fan mail in the previous two episodes, but some of these presents take things to a whole new level. Cat lovers beware.

programme.title: Richard Hammond explains how he got the name 'Hamster'
programme.desc: It has been his nickname since just about ever, but do you know the origin story of why Richard is called 'Hamster'? Listen to Hammond and his friend Zogg have a good old chat about how the famous name came about.

programme.title: How to drive the fastest car of the 1950s in 2019 ft. James May's tips
programme.desc: After debuting in 1948, the Jaguar XK120 went on to become the fastest car in the world during the 1950s. Setting a production car record of 124.6mph, it went on to achieve a phenomenal top speed of 172mph in a highly modified form. So what is it like to drive such a car in 2019? Mike sets out to discover how a millennial should approach driving such a car, with a little help from James May.

programme.title: Jeremy Clarkson explains what's wrong with F1
programme.desc: F1 fans have made their complaints pretty clear in recent years, but now it's Clarkson's time to voice his opinion on the sport he used to love – what the problems are and what he believes needs to be done to fix them. We're not so sure about 16 races in one day, though.

programme.title: We found an abandoned race track in the middle of London
programme.desc: You'd expect to find a race track out in the middle of nowhere, a place far away from any chance of noise complaints and emission issues. But if you pick away at the history of London, you'll find that there used to be a circuit in the city, in a place that is now simply a public park. Let Mike take you through the history of the old race track at Crystal Palace Park in the middle of London.

programme.title: I drove Jeremy Clarkson's Alfa Romeo and he wasn't happy
programme.desc: We recently headed up to Chipping Norton to film with Jeremy at his farm, so we thought it would be a great chance to get up close and personal with his beloved Alfa Romeo. We received permission from Jeremy's partner, but after taking to the wheel, Mike quickly found out that we really needed to run it past Clarkson himself. Here's what happened...

programme.title: The £2.5 million V12 GMA T.50 is the next McLaren F1 – and it uses a fan to create downforce
programme.desc: Gordon Murray blew the world away in the 1990s when he designed the McLaren F1, and now he's back with a brand new hypercar that uses a very similar recipe, apart from one vital ingredient. The GMA T.50 is a V12, manual, carbon fibre hypercar that uses a ground-effect fan to create more downforce than any road car before. Valkyrie, step aside, Professor Murray looks to have pulled a blinder with this £2.5 million weapon.

programme.title: Mike Brewer remembers Richard Hammond before he was on Top Gear | Q&A
programme.desc: With the latest season of Wheeler Dealers on the horizon, we grabbed Mike Brewer for a chat about the show and his love for cars, including the memories he has from working with The Grand Tour trio. He even remembers Hammond from his Renault PR days...

programme.title: James May roasts YouTubers' cars!
programme.desc: Once James May is on YouTube, no one is safe! Watch as James rates the most famous YouTuber cars – from Adam LZ's Zeroy to Jimmy Broadbent's R32 Skyline. Let the roast commence!

programme.title: James May gave us a tour of his new pub
programme.desc: You may have heard in recent weeks that James May has bought half a pub. Although it's still having finishing touches added to it ahead of its opening next week, James kindly offered to give us a sneak peek at what's to come.

programme.title: This Audi TT had two engines and was faster than a McLaren F1
programme.desc: Two turbos is normal, but how about two engines? Say hello to the MTM TT BiMoto, a Frankenstein Audi TT that was twin-engined, created 740bhp and was good for 244mph. Yup, that's faster than a McLaren F1. Watch as Mike Fernie gets far too excited about it.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Priya Krishna's Dahi Bhalla & Shortcut Profiteroles: New York Times food reporter and bestselling cookbook author Priya Krishna came by the studio and prepared two recipes from her new cookbook for kids, Priya's Kitchen Adventures. She makes shortcut profiteroles inspired by her time in Paris, plus dahi bhalla, essentially fritters soaked in yogurt and topped with all kinds of chutneys. Yum!

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Pizza Lover's Pizza" - Inspired by the stunt pies of the internet, Chris Ying is bringing his own dream pizza to life: the Bagel-Bite-topped Boboli. Also featured in this episode: a 19th century Italian love saga. Boboli and Bagel Bites—let’s collab.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "The ONE Pancake" - Chris tackles the fourth most Googled recipe of 2022: "Quick Pancake." His solution? THE ONE PANCAKE. Every ingredient is reduced to a unit of one (1 cup or 1 teaspoon), hence, THE ONE. It's literally an unforgettable recipe for delicious, and, most importantly, quick pancakes.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Fluffy, Buttery Biscuits for the Kiddos: Let's be clear: These are not the biscuits that chef Joshua Skenes used to serve at his three-Michelin-star restaurant Saison. Have I had those biscuits? Yes. Have I watched Josh make biscuits? Yes. Do I have his recipe in my phone? Maybe. Do I glance at that recipe whenever I set out to make biscuits for my kids? Well, wouldn't you? Jokes aside, Josh's biscuits are world-class, and are a product of not just the recipe, but his products and experience. I'm never gonna get them exactly right, but the ones I make are inspired by his. They're definitely passable and my kids can take them in whichever direction they like. My daughter likes it savory. My son likes them smothered in jam.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Whole Roasted Chicken with Morgan McGlone: Our friend Morgan McGlone has cooked a lot of chicken—or "chook," as they call it in Australia, where he's from. He's a hell of a chef and restaurateur, as well as an excellent father to his son, Ryo. In this episode, he talks us through his roast chicken method, which, spoiler alert, involves a lot of butter. This is a bit of a long cook, so it's more of a weekend dish, but nothing beats breaking into a whole chicken with your family. The kids get to see food in its whole form, and pick the pices they want. The only decision you have to make is whether to share the best bits, or save them for yourself.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "1:1 Pancake" - Spurred on by demand for a simple pancake recipe, Chris attempts to create an foolproof, impossible-to-forget pancake recipe.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Jungle Bird and Compari Sun" - It’s been a long week in the studio. Chris wraps up his night by demonstrating the only two cocktail recipes he knows: the Jungle Bird and the Campari Sun.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Salt-Broiled Fish" - After a visit to the studio from Liwei Liao (@dry_aged_fish_guy), Chris finds himself with a beautiful sea bream that’s begging to be prepared simply. Salt-roasting, it is.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave is joined by friend of the show and host of Recipe Club, Chris Ying, and producer (Young) David Meyer. Dave serves a Chinese chicken salad and some leftover jangjorim, then the trio dives into some real "Inappropriate Dinner Conversations" in a new game version that reveals a lot about the three contestants.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave is joined by a friend of the podcast, Noelle, partner at Majordomo Media, as he cooks her a meaningful dish that she did not know he was going to make. They talk about Paris (related to the dish), changes in the global dining scene, and some necessary improvements on the rules of sharing food.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: It's the holidays, and we're planning on snacking to celebrate. Dave is joined by our pal Chris Ying to talk about their snack habits, the lie that is serving sizes, and to cook the easiest and most delicious pasta recipe. They also discuss the masterful maneuver that was rebranding frosting. After a guessing game, the two have an in-depth response to an Ask Dave about when to move on from your current restaurant job.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes karaage for special guest, Hikari, director of 'Beef', 'Tokyo Vice', and now her new movie 'Rental Family'. Hikari and Dave discuss why Osaka is so unique, the idiosyncrasies of Japanese life as seen by both of them while living in Japan, and even a little about the dark underside of such an amazing country. Dave also answers an Ask Dave about knives and asks some inappropriate dinner conversations to his producer Young David.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati arrives in Motul, a town in the history books for Yucatán's once thriving henequén industry and for the egg dish Huevos Motuleños. Pati meets Doña Evelia, who put Motul back on the map with her world-famous recipe. She also experiences the legacy of henequén at Hacienda Tamchén and encounters another egg dish in the kitchen, where chef Julio Ku Dominguez makes Abuela's Buttoned Eggs.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada. She also returns to Hacienda Tamchén for another traditional dish prepared by chef Julio Ku Dominguez called Huidzi Bii Wai, which means "united tortilla."

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients only found in Yucatán that make recados unique, touring citrus, habanero, and chaya fields at an hacienda. Then traditional cook Rosa makes a Relleno Negro using recado negro.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Today no trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. But Mayans saw them as the gateway to the underworld. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with activist and lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people. The next day, Zoila invites Pati to her niece's birthday celebration.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the most unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Engineer Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced. Down the road in Rio Lagartos, conservationist Diego Nuñez takes her to see another pink wonder, Mexico's highest concentration of flamingos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's "league of their own." She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen. After teaching Pati the ins and outs of the game, Doña Enedina invites her over for Brazo de Reina, a tamal with hardboiled eggs and ground pepitas.

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores Nuevo León: the land of cabrito and carne asada. Here, chefs challenge the state’s culinary stereotypes, transforming traditional flavors into exciting new experiences.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Journey to St. John's, Newfoundland, to discover the deep connection locals have with nature's bounty, and meet inspiring individuals who fish, farm, and cook with generations of tradition. Savor unique recipes prepared over crackling fire-pits, including the king of St. John's cuisine: cod.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join Chef Walter Staib on a journey to Colorado Springs, where we'll explore the history of this scenic landscape, from the indigenous Ute people through the era of homesteaders. At the Historic Rock Ledge Ranch, savor delicious recipes that have withstood the test of time. Don't miss out on this opportunity to experience the flavors and heritage of Colorado Springs!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Set sail with Chef Walter Staib on a two-part adventure down the majestic Danube River! Part 1 charts a course through Germany and Austria, exploring stunning valleys amidst Europe's heart. Discover historic sites, artistic treasures, and culinary delights at every stop along this unforgettable journey.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Our journey continues through Austria, Slovakia, and ending in the Hungarian city of Budapest. We’ll marvel at architectural wonders and savor the flavors of the region with Chef Walter Staib as he prepares traditional meals aboard a luxurious cruise ship. Don't miss this unforgettable finale on the mighty Danube!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib visits Curacao to unravel the delicious stories behind this vibrant Caribbean island. We'll meet local chefs who share their culinary passion through mouthwatering dishes like stewed papaya, okra soup, and stuffed Dutch cheese. Unforgettable flavors and island adventures await as we explore Curacao's heritage and unique cuisine, making this an episode you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib dives into the coastal bounty of Port Aransas, Texas! Discover legendary fishing tales, explore the vibrant local culture, and savor unique seafood creations with Chef Pete Mims. Experience how Texas spices meet Gulf Coast flavors in a culinary adventure that blends tradition and innovation. Join us for an unforgettable journey through the rich, diverse tastes of coastal Texas.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Saddle up for Southern charm as Chef Walter Staib rides through Nashville's history at Belle Meade Mansion. Explore the melodic roots of Country Music, visit iconic landmarks, and whip up delicious Southern eats like Country ham, fruitcake, and syllabub. Experience Nashville’s rich cultural heritage and culinary delights in this captivating journey.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Unveil Charleston's soul as we explore the layers of its history at the International African American Museum and a Lowcountry rice farm. Learn crabbing secrets from a local pro, then cook with a passionate chef, celebrating Southern staples of the local cuisine.

programme.desc: Newlywed Benjamin Taber is in town with his bride when a bank robbery goes awry, and she disappears in a chaotic shootout. Determined to find her, Benjamin seeks out the help of crusty Quentin Leech, a bounty hunter who has his own reasons for wanting to catch the outlaws. As they follow the group's trail, they receive help from several unlikely sources, including Flora Mae Pepper, the owner of a brothel that doubles as a safe haven.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: Panic strikes Jane Hammond (Natalie Portman) when her outlaw husband John returns to their farm with bullet wounds. Expecting the worst, she brings her young daughter to safety and travels to the home of Dan Frost (Joel Edgerton), a boozing ex-lover who may be her only hope. With Dan now on her side, Jane prepares for a showdown with the vengeful John Bishop and his gang of thugs. Looking to settle an old score, Bishop must now contend with the gun-toting Jane and her new partner.

programme.title: Johnny Guitar
programme.desc: On the outskirts of town, the hard-nosed Vienna (Joan Crawford) owns a saloon frequented by the undesirables of the region, including Dancin' Kid (Scott Brady) and his gang. Another patron of Vienna's establishment is Johnny Guitar (Sterling Hayden), a former gunslinger and her lover. When a heist is pulled in town that results in a man's death, Emma Small (Mercedes McCambridge), Vienna's rival, rallies the townsfolk to take revenge on Vienna's saloon -- even without proof of her wrongdoing.

programme.title: Colorado Territory
programme.desc: Outlaw Wes McQueen (Joel McCrea) escapes from jail and travels to a meeting with his old partner-in-crime Dave Rickard (Basil Ruysdael). En route, McQueen dispatches a gang of bandits who try to rob the stagecoach and, in the process, wins the attentions of a young woman (Dorothy Malone) with whom he'd like to settle down. Convinced by Rickard to do one last heist, he finds out that his fellow henchmen are not to be trusted and the woman he truly loves is an ex-saloon girl (Virginia Mayo).

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Down By The Bay - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see cat wearing a hat? How about a goat rowing a boat? Well you can in this video for the classic children’s song, Down By The Bay!

programme.title: Mr. Pig & Mr. Mouse Have A Mess On Their Hands - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig love making food and having their friends over to eat it. But afterwards, their house is a complete mess! It's so gross, they don't even want to drive their van home to clean up. How can Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig share their love of food with their friends without cluttering their home? Mr. Monkey has a tasty idea! What is it? Watch and find out!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While in Thailand, Jett Pet and Paul Pet's fruit is swiped by a monkey. Thanawat asks for help getting his toys back so they create an LED ball with a tracking system. The Super Pets travel to Madrid, Spain where they help a boy secure a case for his pet tarantula to ride the train. However an accident causes his tarantula to become super-sized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: After eating Super Pets' trick chocolates, Jett can only move very slowly. An emergency call comes in from a young girl in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, who needs an ice maker delivered. When the Super Pets discover an erupting underwater volcano, a girl orders a megaphone to alert all the villagers fishing in the water. However, they don't listen to her warnings.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets are on World Aircraft to help Jett give some kids a tour. After Storm demonstrates how the package printer works, two packages get mixed up. The Super Pets travel to Tokyo, Japan where they help the Paper Rangers repair an Origami Robot for an action movie. Afterward, they get asked to be ACTORS in the movie!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter mermaid students learning to befriend fish in Cebu, Philippines. Jett and Jerome deliver a microphone and speaker to a girl who wants to sing with them. The Super Pets meet a girl in Paris whose greatest wish is to go to the top of the Eiffel Tower. The elevator cannot run due to an expected storm so Jett and Donnie deliver a tram.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Storm and Stella search for Jett and Donnie after the two Super Wings disappear in thin air. Astra locates their whereabouts - they're in Paris, 1889! While exploring Osaka, Japan, the Super Pets accidentally rip a boy's koinobori for the Children's Day Festival. Jett and Dizzy deliver a huge koinobori for him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy and his giant robot on Jeju Island in South Korea. Before a typhoon comes, Taehoon needs to help his father harvest all the tangerines on their farm. When a little girl and her Dad accidentally fall in an Incan secret dark room, Jett, and Ellie show up in Machu Picchu, Peru, to take part in a historical rescue mission.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When the Super Pets arrive at Ha Long, Vietnam, they meet a boy who wants to take his pet snail on a walk but the snail is too slow. So the boy asks for a snail size skateboard. The Super Pets go to Germany where they participate in a water fight. They accidentally shoot Mona's necklace. Jett and Astra deliver a magnifying glass to find the missing bead.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When the Super Pets accidentally break a boulder on the roof of a house in Monsanto, Portugal, a girl orders tape to stick it back together. Golden Boy tries to outshine them. The Super Pets' Mini Base accidentally gets tangled up in an octopus kite, pulling it to the ground and destroying it. The Super Wings deliver paper and string to make a new kite.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Singapore, Jett and Lucie use electric powers to shrink Happy the giant robot dog. In Paris, Jett and Marty turn a giant baguette into a train to deliver it to a festival.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver time-travel to uncover a dinosaur footprint’s creator. Jett and Dizzy rescue a bus stuck in a ditch using Monster Truck Tires, getting the kids to school on time.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Tiki, and Taki recover stolen costumes to save a dragon dance in Sichuan. In Antalya, Jett and Marty protect a giant sandcastle after Golden Girl's magic enlarges it and Jett

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Tino retrieve a mood lamp from mammoths after a Stone Age detour, delivering it to LA. In Cairo, Jett and Sally restore order after Golden Girl's magic animates the Sphinx.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Tino save hamsters and Tino from a robot vacuum mishap in London. In Manang, Jett and Marty use robot legs to save a school from sliding off a cliff with a snow ramp.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On the Lunar base, Super Wings help Kajsa’s tulips bloom despite a meteor shower. On Check-Up Day, Jett's booster fails, but Storm's Battery Boosting Bases restore power.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Golden Boy and Golden Girl impersonate Jett and Lucie, causing chaos with a giant cookie. The real Super Wings save the day. Tommy uses his giant dino to fix a park bridge.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Kasja and her dad use Super Wings’ food truck to serve pancakes in space despite a rock belt. Jett and Traver restore power in Brazil by fixing the dam and reversing Iguaçu Falls.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Tino, with teamwork, capture a giant dragonfly and let it go. Gita and the Super Wings save the town from a snowball using cricket skills to handle playful baby yetis.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Little Red Car - Popular Songs
programme.desc: Watch this whole bunch of popular songs by the Little Red Car for kids. Hope you enjoy them!

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty Nursery Rhymes and Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Enjoy Farmees Humpty Dumpty and popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Luke and Lily Baby Shark - Shark Song For Kids
programme.desc: Kids! We've taken your favorite songs like Baby Shark, The Muffin Man, Little Bo Peep and put them in a compilation for several minutes of pure, uninterrupted fun learning and singing with Luke and Lily.

programme.title: Daddy's Red Car + Fun Nursery Rhymes for Kindergarten
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Super Supremes as they sing and dance in this fun kids video. Learn preschool songs, numbers, abc, shapes, colors and more made easy and fun with this nursery rhyme and kids song playlist with rhymes like Daddy’s red car, I spy wheels on the bus, Twinkle Twinkle Little Star and more.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpy & More Kids Rhymes (Little Treehouse)
programme.desc: Do you kids know what happened to Humpty Dumpty when he sat on the wall? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with the Little Tree House gang, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Learn Street Vehicles for Children - Kids Channel
programme.desc: A cool collection of education videos for preschool kids & babies where they learn the names of color car cartoons like super trucks, helicopters, garbage trucks, ambulance, digger, loader, fire engine, tractor, bus, police car, bulldozer and more. This kids action and adventure show includes different types of transport like street, emergency, army, construction and more vehicles for children.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Kids Songs (Baby Bao Panda)
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with Baby Bao Panda, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Ben The Train Kids Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Ben the fun kids toy train is back with more songs and rhymes like old Macdonald, Alphabet song, phonics abc song, opposites song, incy wincy spider, five little monkeys, finger family etc. This family friendly children's show promotes learning and family bonds.

programme.title: Umi Uzi Halloween Songs for Kids
programme.desc: Umi Uzi is an adorable toddler who loves to go on adventures. She isn't afraid to explore her environment and learn new and important lessons in each episode. Nursery rhymes and children's songs are her favorite way of solving problems and learning new words. Join her this Halloween in this wonderful collection of the most popular scary songs specially made for kids!

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Professor Von Schlemmer (from Too Tall Tails) has created a machine which brings dreams to life. When Robotnik hears about it, he forces the Professor to alter the machine so that nightmares come to life.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic loses his memory when Robotnik uses a hypnotic flower pollen on him, and tells him he's just an "ordinary" guy.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When an undersea world is threatened by Captain Memo and his lobster sub, Sonic spreads a rumor that Memo plans to attack Robotnik next.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.
